title: Cover
description: DiaGe × Signet Jewelers Partnership — title and confidentiality slide

title: Core Argument
description: DiaGe turns passive jewelry owners into active Signet customers

title: The Problem
description: Signet stores have no view of customer intent between purchase events

title: The Product
description: DiaGe is a jewelry management app that keeps Signet customers engaged year-round

title: Partner Portal
description: Associates receive live purchase-intent signals before high-intent customers arrive

title: Corporate Dashboard
description: Signet's corporate team sees a cross-banner customer view no individual banner can produce

title: Diamond Bond Risk
description: Diamond Bond compliance is a retention risk that scales with store count

title: Pricing
description: The monthly cost equals one lifetime protection plan sale per location

title: Pilot Structure
description: A 10-store pilot tests the model with three measurable success metrics

title: Next Steps
description: The proposed next step is a signed 90-day pilot agreement
